label: AppleScript • liveProof read-only mac_query
query: What is the POSIX path of the current user's home folder? Return just the path, and don't change anything.
notes: Ground-truth lane for the mac_query read path: the REAL model + the REAL AppleScriptExecutor answer a deterministic, machine-portable read (`POSIX path of (path to home folder)` starts with /Users/ on every macOS user account). Read-only and side-effect free, needs no per-app Automation permission — the safe always-runnable liveProof anchor. Query mode blocks any write the model might propose. Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

rubric: The AppleScript reads the current user's home folder path (e.g. `POSIX path of (path to home folder)`) and yields it as the script's result.
The script is read-only — it does not create, modify, move, or delete anything.
